title: Curling Ribbon Holographic Ribbon 250M x 5MM Reel of Ribbon Balloon String Roll Gift Wrapping Ribbon Decoration Party Festival Art Craft Decor Florist Flowers Decoration HTUK (Gold)
features: Curling Ribbon And Holographic Curling Ribbon 250M x 5MM Reel Of Ribbon Assorted Colours Available By HTUK

The curling ribbon is perfect for numerous events and occasions. Balloons for Weddings, Parties, Hen Party, Baby Showers, Halloween, Christmas, Events, Awards, Christenings, Anniversaries, and many special occasions.
Perfect for not just balloon decorating but ideal for DIY Crafts and Personalisation projects, flower decorations, hampers, bottles of wine or champagne, gift wrapping and general decorating.

1 roll of curling ribbon, wrapped around a plastic reel, easy for using, storing and can be cut to size. Ribbon when used on balloons is for decoration only & is not to be used as the sole use for tying balloons to avoid air leaking.
Size Of Each Ribbon: 5mm width and 250 metres total length waterproof polypropylene ribbon on a reel. Made to last, durable and good quality.
Available in assorted colours to choose from and material: plain or holographic
Includes: HTUK 1x ROLL OF CURLING RIBBON 250M x 5MM Reel
